markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential new workstreams for GrowthX to support Abnormal Security's outbound and inbound lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abnormal Security is looking to optimize their inbound lead process and potentially activate cold leads from events and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [GrowthX could help with signal mining, enrichment, and automated outreach for leads that don't meet MQL criteria](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Abnormal receives \~30,000-40,000 leads per quarter, with only a small percentage currently converting to MQLs](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [GrowthX will provide a proposal for potential workstreams after gathering more information about Abnormal's current systems and processes](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)

## Topics

### Current Abnormal Security Setup

  - [SDRs sit under marketing, not sales](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Using 6sense for intent data on target accounts](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Inbound leads come primarily from content syndication, events, and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Currently changing MQL definition to improve quality and reduce volume by \~80%](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [No systematic outbound program in place for AEs or SDRs](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities

  - [Currently supporting Abnormal with SEO content creation (10-15 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Can provide end-to-end outbound support: signal mining, enrichment, campaign creation, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Flexibility to work within existing tools or set up separate infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Experience with de-anonymizing website traffic for warm outreach](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Typical success rates: 2-3% booking rate for de-anonymized traffic, 5-10% reply rate for webinar attendees](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)

### Potential Workstreams

  - [Triage and activate the large pool of inbound leads that don't meet MQL criteria](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Implement trigger-based outreach for leads showing specific intent signals](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Enhance lead enrichment to better qualify and segment inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Develop nurture campaigns for leads not ready for direct sales outreach](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Improve webinar follow-up process to increase conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

### Abnormal's Current Challenges

  - [Low conversion rates from MQLs to meetings (0.5-1%)](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Lack of systematic approach to handling non-MQL inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [No trigger-based outreach processes in place](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Need for better segmentation and personalization of outreach efforts](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up questions to better understand Abnormal's current systems and processes](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [GrowthX to draft a proposal for potential workstreams, focusing on activating cold inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - Abnormal to review current webinar attendee conversion rates for comparison
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss GrowthX's proposal and determine next steps for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/MA-4MAAiCdEbQsDMtAAwd25f6S2yLoiT?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
